case_title: LEO EPP CO. vs. SKOVRONSKI, ANNETTE "NICKI" et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKOVRONSKI, ANNETTE "NICKI" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1740 BROADWAY STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, -NOTATIONS MADE ON THE ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522.

NOTICE OF RULING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO.

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $941.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE AUG-16-2001, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO.

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, DECLARATION, ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO. HEARING SET FOR JUL-10-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SKOVRONSKI, ANNETTE "NICKI"

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEO EPP CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SKOVRONSKI, ANNETTE "NICKI" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1740 BROADWAY STREET, #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,599.64 RENT, $3,614.10 ATTORNEY FEES, $941.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,154.74, -NOTATIONS MADE ON THE ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522.
